Component.Name: DetailFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 4fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 12; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(17) TARGET(UNKNOWN14)

Component.Name: ExprJobSuffixStatic
Component.DataSource: expression( IF(!(ISEMPTY(P(Job))) && !(ISEMPTY(P(Suffix))), P(Job) + '-' + RIGHT( CONCAT( '0000', P( Suffix ) ), 4 ) , IF(!(ISEMPTY(P(Job))),P(Job),RIGHT( CONCAT( '0000', P( Suffix ) ), 4 ) ) ) )

Component.Name: ExprJobTypeCaption2Static
Component.DataSource: expression( IF( (P(JobType)) == 'Planned Order', STRINGS('sPlannedOrder'), IF((P(JobType)) == 'MPS Order', STRINGS('sMPSOrder'), '')) )

Component.Name: flexLayout1_SITE
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1_SITE; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN0_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN2_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN3_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN4_SITE; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN5_SITE; VALUE: 2fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN6_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN7_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION9(ID: UNKNOWN8_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION10(ID: UNKNOWN9_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION11(ID: UNKNOWN10_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(15) TARGET(UNKNOWN15_SITE)

Component.Name: JobTypeCaptionStatic
Component.DataSource: expression( IF( (P(JobType)) == 'Job', STRINGS('sJob'), IF( (P(JobType)) == 'Production Schedule', STRINGS('sProductionSchedule'), IF( (P(JobType)) == 'Estimate Job', 'sEstimateJob', C(ExprJobTypeCaption2Static) ) ) ) )

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(ResourceGroupType), VAR V(ResourceStarting), VAR V(ResourceEnding), VAR V(ResourceGroupStarting), VAR V(ResourceGroupEnding), VAR V(ResourceTypeStarting), VAR V(ResourceTypeEnding), VAR V(ScheduleDateStarting), VAR V(ScheduleDateEnding), VAR V(ScheduleDateStartingOffset), VAR V(ScheduleDateEndingOffset), VAR V(ShowDateTime), VAR V(DisplayHeader), VAR V(Parm_Site))
